findings.location: s1 — 可変条件のSQLの場合 / OR条件の制限事項
findings.description: Source provides a concrete SQL code example showing the correct alternative implementation when using OR conditions (通常のSQL文): a SELECT with OR in WHERE clause using :loginId, :userKanjiName%, :userKanaName%, :groupId. The knowledge file explains the concept ('OR条件を使う場合は通常のSQL文を使用すること') but omits this code example that demonstrates the correct usage pattern.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains a `.. code-block:: sql` block under the OR condition warning with: `WHERE (USER_MTR.LOGIN_ID = :loginId OR USER_MTR.USER_KANJI_NAME LIKE :userKanjiName% OR ...)`

findings.description: `getParameterizedSqlStatement` is the primary API method used throughout the source (appears in every code example) but is absent from the hints list.
findings.source_evidence: Source code examples repeatedly call `getParameterizedSqlStatement("GET")`, `getParameterizedSqlStatement("GET_LIST2", user)`, etc. in every section.
